Defines display orientation, type, dimensions, and framebuffer size for the Tintin board.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines several preprocessor macros related to display configurations for a device. It specifies constants for display orientations, color capabilities, and shape (rectangular or round). The macros `PBL_DISPLAY_WIDTH` and `PBL_DISPLAY_HEIGHT` define the dimensions of the display in pixels. Legacy display dimensions are also defined for compatibility purposes, using the same width and height values. The macro `DISPLAY_FRAMEBUFFER_BYTES` calculates the size of the display's framebuffer in bytes, using a rounding function to align the width to a 32-bit boundary.
